lovable_integration_message.paste_this_to_lovable: Please wire the 5 uploaded curriculum files from HighSchool_Adaptive_Framework_Mega_Pack_01 into the existing assessment app as metadata/config only, not as duplicate questions. Treat the manifest as the pack entry point. Use adaptive framework for skill tracking and recommendation rules, mastery ladders for proficiency progression and remediation unlocks, daily challenges for rotating challenge surfaces, and engagement & story modes for optional retention features. Connect these files to the current question bank by exam, subject, difficulty, skill tag, and grade band where available. If field names do not match, map them rather than discarding content. Expose the following product features: targeted practice, daily challenge, mastery progress, hints/explanations, streaks/badges, and optional story/competitive modes. Do not create duplicate question records from these framework files. If any schema mismatch blocks ingestion, list the exact field names expected so they can be remapped.

integration_notes: attach features to existing question tables
